mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_link_import_batch (label_id, batch_name, source_file_name, total_rows, inserted_rows, adopted_rows, skipped_rows, failed_rows, created_by) VALUES (#{labelId}, #{batchName}, #{sourceFileName}, #{totalRows}, #{insertedRows}, #{adoptedRows}, #{skippedRows}, #{failedRows}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE group_link_import_batch SET total_rows = #{totalRows}, inserted_rows = #{insertedRows}, adopted_rows = #{adoptedRows}, skipped_rows = #{skippedRows}, failed_rows = #{failedRows} WHERE id = #{id}
